text.message: I have a bad setup domt rob me
Teach me how to roll 7s black lol
i have no port opportunities and you have two good ones
who are you trying to convince?
not trying to convince anyone, but responding to your complaint
im getting the 7s but not the rolls
Weve had one unblocked 6 roll haha
yes, but u have great setup according to red
you got two cities quit whining
no ur just doing the whole "woe is me" thing when you're ahead
i definitely thought there was more
To connect, I have a yop
red lost the game because he cant contain his feelings
yea, u are qa question mark
Just not for the instant win anymore
how is oj not the rob?
Im on 9 but still a long way to go lol
i wasn't even mad at blue, he was just ahead
u did but that doesn't make me crash out
looks like you did since u only robed me
i'm feeling sick to my stomach for what i did to blue
yes, we all care about your stomach
probably the most punished catan player ever
